nl_query: Show the complete timeline for each board created last month: creation date, first script assignment date, first evaluation attempt start date, first freeze date, last submission date, and the total number of days the board has been open.
failed_sql: SELECT b.id AS board_id, b.created_at AS creation_date, min(sa.assigned_at) AS first_script_assignment_date, min(ea.started_at) AS first_evaluation_attempt_start_date, min(ea.frozen_at) AS first_freeze_date, max(ea.submitted_at) AS last_submission_date, (max(ea.submitted_at) - b.created_at) * 86400 AS total_days_open FROM board b JOIN script_assignment sa ON sa.board_id = b.id JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.board_id = b.id WHERE b.created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month' GROUP BY b.id ORDER BY b.created_at ASC LIMIT 100;
error: Validation failed (schema): Column validation failed: answer_script does NOT have board_id. Join to board via board.course_id = answer_script.course_id AND board.exam_id = answer_script.exam_id.
